premise: A burned-out warehouse clerk discovers the forklift certification course is a dungeon tutorial with an audience.
tone: deadly serious survival inside absurd warehouse-dungeon game-show rules
injected_beats: The SYSTEM announces a safety violation as if it is a boss encounter.
The hero must solve danger with only mundane warehouse gear.
A fake audience reaction changes the reward.

extra_injected_beats: Open mid-incident with the hero ducking under a possessed pallet jack.
The party argues over whether OSHA rules still apply.

locked_part_scripts.mechanics-reveal: <NARRATOR>The tutorial display flickered, waiting for the next real smoke run.</NARRATOR><SYSTEM>MECHANICS PLACEHOLDER: Reward tables deferred.</SYSTEM><GUIDE>Further details will unlock after the live smoke passes.</GUIDE><HERO>Fine. I will be annoyed later.</HERO><MERCHANT>Excellent. Annoyance has resale value.</MERCHANT><MENTOR>Keep the receipt.</MENTOR>
locked_part_scripts.boss-setpiece: <NARRATOR>The loading bay doors groaned like they were rehearsing for a larger chapter.</NARRATOR><HERO>This is where a boss fight goes.</HERO><SYSTEM>BOSS PLACEHOLDER ACCEPTED.</SYSTEM><BOSS>Return when the budget allows screaming.</BOSS><BEAST>Rrr.</BEAST><MINION>We support fiscal restraint.</MINION><SIDEKICK>That is somehow worse.</SIDEKICK>
locked_part_scripts.fallout-cliffhanger: <NARRATOR>The dungeon saved the recording and marked the chapter incomplete but alive.</NARRATOR><HERO>I survived the smoke test. That counts.</HERO><SYSTEM>CLIFFHANGER: Audio rendering remains disabled.</SYSTEM><VILLAIN>For now.</VILLAIN><RIVAL>Do not get smug.</RIVAL><MENTOR>Too late.</MENTOR>
